notes: The only semantic symbol in the statement (Gamma |= phi) is def:log-consequence, whose gloss is 'semantic entailment ... across structures' -- i.e. it is itself defined via def:fol-satisfaction. So def:fol-satisfaction is plausibly a TRANSITIVE dep reached through def:log-consequence rather than a direct stating-dependency, and could be trimmed for a clean direct set {def:log-consequence}. Left as-is (flag, not forced removal) because confirming requires reading def:log-consequence's own deps. Reviewer: decide direct-vs-transitive convention; whatever is chosen should also govern completeness (0013) for dual symmetry. The provability side (|-) has no node.
